text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, Sandy sailed a tiny kite high over hayfields. Its silhouette glowed orange against the slowlychanging sky.

A raccoon watched curiously. She’d never seen an animal fly something like that before.

Approaching gently, she grabbed the string.

“Help!” she twittered.

Sandy took off. They soared side by side. The raccoon felt exhilarated.

Back down in human territory, they settled under an oak. The girl was awestruck.

“That was fun!” she exclaimed.

S Sandy.
